results.title: Exxon Mobil Corporation (XOM)
results.snippet: ExxonMobil is scheduled to hold its 1Q 2026 Earnings Call on May 1, 2026 at 8:30 AM CST, with details provided for listen-only dial-in access.

results.title: ExxonMobil Q1 2026 Earnings Report
results.snippet: ExxonMobil is set to announce Q1 2026 earnings on May 1, 2026 before market open, with consensus EPS estimates at $1.80 and expected revenue of $80.45 billion.

results.title: Exxon signals lower Q1 profit despite higher oil, gas prices from Iran war
results.snippet: A Reuters report from April 8, 2026 indicates Exxon expects lower Q1 earnings due to a $5.3 billion hit from hedging and timing effects, despite higher oil prices, projecting around $5 billion or $1.20 per share.

results.title: Exxon Mobil (XOM) Earnings - Public Investing
results.snippet: Public Investing notes Exxon Mobil's Q4 2025 earnings beat estimates in January 2026, with Q1 2026 results anticipated on May 1, 2026 and consensus EPS at $1.45.

results.title: Quarterly reports
results.snippet: ExxonMobil's investor site provides access to historical quarterly 10-Q filings, including reports from 2025 that offer context ahead of the upcoming Q1 2026 release.

results.title: Exxon Leads the Pack for 2026 Permian Supply Growth
results.snippet: Our survey of 14 public operators in the Permian Basin points to 2.7% growth in oil production in 2026, or ~183 Mb/d.

results.title: ExxonMobil Price Prediction: How High Will The Oil Stock ...
results.snippet: ExxonMobil (XOM) posted record production of 4.7 million oil-equivalent barrels per day in 2025, with Guyana reaching 875,000 gross barrels per day and the Permian at 1.8 million barrels per day in Q4.

results.title: ExxonMobil Loses 6% of Its Global Production in 1Q26
results.snippet: ExxonMobil lost 6% of its global production in 1Q26 as the conflict paralyzed oil and natural gas operations across the Persian Gulf.

results.title: ExxonMobil Oil Production to Rise in 2026
results.snippet: Oil output is projected to average about 840,000 barrels per day (b/d) in 2026, up from an estimated 715,000 b/d in 2025, as production stabilizes at ExxonMobil’s Yellowtail project and the Uaru project is commissioned.

results.title: ExxonMobil Price Prediction: How High Will The Oil Stock ...
results.snippet: ExxonMobil benefits from elevated oil prices, record production at advantaged assets, and a $20 billion 2026 buyback program.

results.title: ExxonMobil (XOM) Stock Forecast and Price Target 2026
results.snippet: According to 21 analysts, the average twelve-month price target for ExxonMobil (XOM) is $159.20, with a high forecast of $185.00 and a low of $111.00.

results.title: Exxon Mobil Rose 7% This Week. Here's Where the Stock Could Go in 2026
results.snippet: Exxon Mobil stock rose about 7% this week, with a valuation model projecting a target price of $196 and about 15% upside into 2026.

results.title: Exxon Mobil (XOM) Stock Forecast - Public Investing
results.snippet: 19 analysts rate Exxon Mobil (XOM) a Buy with a consensus 2026 price target of $157.63.

results.title: Exxon Mobil Corporation (XOM)
results.snippet: Analyst estimates project average 2026 revenue of $376.2B and EPS of $9.84 for Exxon Mobil based on 13-25 analysts.

results.title: ExxonMobil Stock in 2026: Is XOM Worth Buying at $152
results.snippet: 24 Wall Street analysts cover XOM with a Buy consensus, mean price target of $162.71, and median of $166.00 from current levels near $152.
